_meta.purpose: Curated, hand-picked list of inspiring women role models surfaced alongside cascade-search results. Inference-free — every profile is intentionally chosen, not algorithmically guessed. Edit freely.

mentors.name: Reshma Saujani
mentors.inspiration: Built one of the largest pipelines for women in tech globally.

mentors.name: Diane Greene
mentors.inspiration: Founded VMware, then led Google Cloud. Engineer-turned-CEO blueprint.

mentors.name: Padmasree Warrior
mentors.inspiration: From CTO of Cisco and Motorola to founding her own startup.

mentors.name: Aparna Chennapragada
mentors.inspiration: Built AR/AI products at Google before becoming Robinhood's CPO and now leading AI at Microsoft.

mentors.name: Deepa Subramaniam
mentors.inspiration: Engineering background → top product roles at Adobe, change.org, Code for America.

mentors.name: Shreyas Doshi
mentors.inspiration: Influential PM thinker — note: identifies as male; included only as a learning resource if no women mentor matches.

mentors.name: Fei-Fei Li
mentors.currentRole: Co-Director, Stanford HAI · Founder, World Labs
mentors.inspiration: Created ImageNet — catalysed the modern deep learning era.

mentors.name: Cassie Kozyrkov
mentors.currentRole: CEO, Kozyr · ex-Chief Decision Scientist, Google
mentors.inspiration: Made statistics + ML accessible to thousands of practitioners through her writing.

mentors.name: Hilary Mason
mentors.currentRole: Founder & CEO, Hidden Door · ex-Chief Scientist, Bitly
mentors.inspiration: Pioneer of applied data science; now building AI-native storytelling products.

mentors.name: Sheryl Sandberg
mentors.inspiration: Defined modern operator-leadership at Google, then Facebook/Meta.

mentors.name: Falguni Nayar
mentors.inspiration: Left investment banking at 50 to build India's most successful beauty unicorn.

mentors.name: Ruchi Sanghvi
mentors.currentRole: Co-founder, South Park Commons · ex-VP Operations, Dropbox
mentors.inspiration: First woman engineer at Facebook → founder → talent ecosystem builder.

mentors.name: Julie Zhuo
mentors.inspiration: Wrote 'The Making of a Manager'; scaled design from intern to VP at Meta.

mentors.name: Katie Dill
mentors.currentRole: Head of Design, Stripe · ex-VP Design, Lyft & Airbnb
mentors.inspiration: Built design teams at three iconic consumer companies.

mentors.name: Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw
mentors.inspiration: Built India's largest biopharma company starting from her garage in 1978.

mentors.name: Indra Nooyi
mentors.inspiration: First woman of colour to lead a Fortune 50 company.
